functional_audit.check: Chat header/messages components export from chat barrel with typed ChatConversation and ChatMessage props
ChatHeader binds conversation.title, mode_badge_text, and disclaimer_badge_text to bTIRh/bTIRi/bTIRs with IR defaults
ChatMessagesList maps messages array to role-specific cells with user right-align and assistant left-align + avatar column

ui_evidence.notes: RE - chat root intentionally deferred to DS-06 ChatReusable shell; DS-05 scope covers only header + messages children
Left title column group under bTIRb
Text_body_ plus text-lg font-semibold override for title emphasis
Text_body_ with text-xs muted color for mode badge
Lucide Info icon with Icon_default_ class
Text_small_ via bubbleStyle(); data-style-ref attribute omitted
Text_body_ on bubble; primary bgcolor applied via Tailwind not a Bubble style_ref

critiques.finding: User bubble (bTISS) and assistant content group (bTIUP) use hard-coded Tailwind bgcolor/radius tokens instead of resolving a Bubble style_ref from styles.json. AC-3 requires DS-01 classes for typography and badge colors but leaves bubble shells implicit; colors may drift from IR if tokens change.
critiques.alternative: Extract chat bubble shell styles into bubble-styles.css (or map to an existing Group_* style) and apply via bubbleStyle() on bTISS/bTIUP wrappers.

critiques.finding: Title text bTIRh applies Text_body_ then overrides with text-lg font-semibold; IR names the element Text chat-panel-title and may use heading-weight presentation rather than raw body 16px.
critiques.alternative: Resolve bTIRh presentation from element_definitions/bTIRa and either drop overrides or switch to the correct Text_heading_* / font_weight from IR.

critiques.finding: New chat components are not yet composed into ChatWindow.tsx or Chat.tsx; prototype still uses ai-elements. In-scope for DS-05 (library primitives) but downstream screens will not show IR-faithful chat until DS-06 wires the shell.
critiques.alternative: DS-06 should replace ChatWindow internals with ChatReusable composing these exports.

critiques.finding: Assistant disclaimer bTIUU renders a module-level constant (CHAT_ASSISTANT_DISCLAIMER) rather than a per-message prop; Bubble binds bTIUU text via parent chatmessage data.
critiques.alternative: Add optional disclaimer_text to ChatMessage or derive from conversation context when DS-06 integrates live data.
